sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (date_time DateTime64, description String);
INSERT INTO test_dates (date_time, description) VALUES (toDateTime('2024-01-01 00:00:00'), 'Initial date time');
UPDATE test_dates SET date_time = addNanoseconds(date_time, 5000000) WHERE description = 'Initial date time';
SELECT addNanoseconds(date_time, 1000000) AS updated_date_time FROM test_dates;
SELECT addNanoseconds(toString(date_time), 10000000) AS updated_date_time_string FROM test_dates;
